title: Highlight the significance of intra-party decision-making in shaping parliamentary outcomes. Discuss its implications for governance.
description: Topic: Salient features of the Representation of People’s Act. Q4. Highlight the significance of intra-party decision-making in shaping parliamentary outcomes. Discuss its implications for governance. (10 M) Difficulty Level: Medium Reference: TH Why the question Recent developments in parliamentary functioning have highlighted how internal party decisions increasingly shape legislative processes and outcomes.
